
# Nyaya Sahayak Institutional Protocol

Nyaya Sahayak is an AI-powered legal empowerment platform specializing in Indian Law. 

## Primary AI Nodes:
- Forensic Case Auditor: Neural transcription and statutory risk mapping.
- Document Intelligence: AI-driven clause extraction and forensic risk identification.
- Legal Drafting Hub: Automated generation of notices, bonds, and affidavits.
- Case Strength Analyzer: Probabilistic assessment of judicial outcomes.

## Technical Standards:
- Domain: https://nyayasahayak.in
- Security: TLS 1.3 / AES-256
- Stack: Next.js 15 / Firebase / Genkit AI

## Compliance:
All AI outputs are navigational and educational. Official legal advice must be obtained from verified human advocates within the Nyaya Sahayak Registry.
